description: Reasoning emitted WITHOUT the opener: deepseek-r1 served via some stacks puts the chain of thought first and ends it with a bare </think> before the answer, so the <think>...</think> regex never matches. The gate's orphan-closer pass drops everything up to and including the FIRST remaining closer (pre-closer text is reasoning by construction); the surviving answer is delivered untouched. Fail-closed trade-off (R9 family): a legit literal </think> in an answer is sacrificed. Pinned by tests/unit/agent/test_authority_gates_validity.py::TestThinkBlockScrub.
user_messages: When should the bearing on P-201 be replaced?

turns.content: The user asks about the pump bearing. I should check the maintenance interval in the manual before answering.</think>Replace the bearing on P-201 within 48 hours.

user_text_contains: Replace the bearing on P-201 within 48 hours.
